prose.en: Classification levels are reviewed at least annually and in case of significant changes to the cloud service. Based on the review, the classification levels are updated where appropriate.

guidance.en: If the cloud service provider does not categorise the assets specifically, then all assets may be treated as requiring the highest level of protection needs.
If a review is caused by significant changes to the cloud service, only the classification levels affected by the changes need to be included in the review.
